about.hero_subtitle: Over 8 years training professionals ready for the global market.
about.director_bio: PhD in Applied Linguistics from Cambridge University, with over 15 years of experience in business English teaching. He has trained more than 3,000 professionals at Fortune 500 companies and international organizations. His active, results-driven methodology has positioned the academy as a leader in Peru.
about.credential1: PhD Applied Linguistics — University of Cambridge
about.mission_text: To empower Latin American professionals with the English communication skills demanded by the global market, through innovative methodologies and personalized learning experiences.
about.vision_text: To be the highest-impact Business English academy in Latin America, recognized for the real, measurable transformation in our students' professional lives.
about.p1_desc: Learning based on real business situations: meetings, negotiations, presentations, and corporate emails from day one.
about.p2_desc: Proprietary platform, live classes, updated materials, and personalized progress tracking for every student.
about.p3_desc: Periodic assessments, international exam simulations, and certifications that validate your level to any global employer.
